---
title: "Miss De Salis"
---

## Miss De Salis

### Description

bridesmaid to Jane Colborne

### Biography

The two best candidates seem to be Anna Sophia Elisabeth de Salis (1832-1916) and Henrietta de Salis (1825-1863) [LG]

### Letters

- Letter from October 3. [1857]
- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
